description: An impressionist landscape showing a wide river stretching across the middle of the composition. On the right bank in the foreground, tall grasses and wildflowers line the water's edge. Across the river, a low town with white buildings extends along the far bank. A small boat sits on the calm water. The sky is filled with grey-blue clouds with patches of lighter blue. The brushwork is loose and characteristic of Impressionism, capturing the fleeting effects of light on water and atmosphere.
